boundary_rows.reading: 300308 holding-veto promotion remains outside the already frozen packaging mainline surface.
300308 may be promotable on its own while joint 300308/300502 core residual promotion remains deferred.
The promotion is justified because the selected state-conditioned holding veto beats both neutral and the blunt uniform half-life cut.

interpretation: V1.12CX converts 300308's late-stage main-markup holding-veto from a residual candidate into a governed promotion decision.
The review supports promotion of 300308 as a standalone holding-veto candidate while preserving separation from packaging's frozen mainline surface and the deferred joint core stack.
